overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit city at night. The character passes a distinctive rainbow-colored cube building and continues along curved streets beneath elevated highways, surrounded by holographic billboards and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: rainbow-colored cube building with changing LED panels comes into view ahead
passing under brighter neon signs increases local illumination with pink and cyan hues

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement toward the colorful cube building, passing anime-themed murals on the left

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the distance toward the cube building

entered.detail: tall building with large square panels cycling through rainbow colors including pink, blue, green, and orange
building facade covered with large anime character murals in blue and orange tones
yellow-green metal barriers lining the right side of the street
floating digital advertisement displaying animated graphics above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet cyberpunk street at night, approaching a striking rainbow-colored cube building that dominates the center of the view. Neon signs and holographic billboards illuminate the scene with cyan and pink light, while anime murals decorate the building to the left. The pavement reflects the colorful lights, and sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street with art deco cylindrical buildings and vertical signage

events.description: character turns left around the corner of the rainbow cube building
entering a narrower street with cylindrical art deco architecture and green neon lighting

agents.ego_description: turning left around the cube building and proceeding down a narrower street lined with cylindrical buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the right sidewalk

entered.detail: cylindrical building with rounded corners and multiple windows, lit with purple and green neon
tall vertical signage with Japanese characters and bright colors
large metal framework and pipes crossing overhead between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character turns left around the rainbow cube building, revealing a narrower street with distinctive cylindrical art deco architecture. The lighting shifts to emphasize green and purple neon as the character passes vertical signage and overhead industrial structures. Pedestrians walk toward the camera on the right while the cube building disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved street beneath elevated highway with guardrails and neon storefronts

events.description: white car drives past on the right side of the curved road
passing under the elevated highway overpass into a more enclosed corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved road beneath the overpass, passing pedestrians and vehicles

notable_agents.action: person with a glowing yellow umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure overhead with support pillars
large blue and red illuminated sign reading CHAOS mounted on a building
metal guardrail following the curve of the street with red and white striped sections

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a curved road that bends to the right, passing beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. A prominent blue and red CHAOS neon sign illuminates the right side of the street. The environment becomes more enclosed and darker under the overpass, with metal guardrails lining the left side. A pedestrian with a glowing yellow umbrella walks ahead, and sparse traffic passes by on the wet asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district that shifts from a vibrant, open plaza into a darker, enclosed urban corridor. It begins with the character walking toward a striking rainbow-colored cube building, where cyan and pink neon lights reflect off the wet pavement and anime murals line the walls. As the character turns left around the cube, the scene shifts toward a narrower street characterized by cylindrical art deco architecture and a transition to green and purple lighting. The camera then follows the road as it curves to the right, moving beneath the heavy shadow of a massive elevated highway overpass. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed and dim, illuminated by a prominent blue and red CHAOS neon sign while a pedestrian with a glowing yellow umbrella walks ahead on the dark asphalt.
